name: Kartoffelpfannkuchen (Potato Pancakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate raw potatoes into water to which lemon juice has been added.
2. Place the grated potatoes in a strainer or cheese cloth and drain off liquid thoroughly.
3. Beat the boiled and mashed potato with egg, milk, and salt until well combined to form a batter.
4. Heat 3 tablespoons vegetable oil in a large frying pan.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil, forming about 3-4 pancakes at a time.
6. When the pancakes are firm on the bottom side, loosen the edges with a spatula and gently flip them over.
7. Cook until browned on the other side, then remove from the pan and drain excess oil on paper towels.
8. Keep the cooked pancakes warm and repeat steps 3-7 until all batter is used.
If served with meat, sprinkle with salt. If served with applesauce, sprinkle with sugar.
